_readme: Filled in manually after a live scouting session (Claude driving your real logged-in Chrome across TikTok/Instagram/YouTube finance hashtags). The strategist_agent.sh cron job on the droplet reads this file whenever 'collected_at' is newer than its last-processed date, turns the entries into new video-scripts-queue.json script ideas, then waits for the next scouting session. Overwrite this whole file each time you scout — it's a snapshot, not a running log.

entries.format: cinematic aesthetic edit — moody film-style clips (car/city at night), bold white centered text overlay, short loop
entries.audio_note: moody instrumental/voice clip, matches the cinematic tone
entries.why_it_works: extremely high save-to-like ratio — aspirational/quotable content people bookmark to rewatch or resend, not just react to

entries.format: carousel listicle — one job title + pay range per slide, movie stills as the visual instead of stock photos or plain text
entries.hook_text: Finance Jobs That Can Make You a Millionaire
entries.why_it_works: real numbers + recognizable movie imagery per slide gives concrete, save-worthy value instead of generic advice

entries.format: single real example as proof — an actual detailed resume shown in full, text overlay pointing to creator's page for help
entries.hook_text: Make use of this time off by updating your resume!
entries.why_it_works: exceptional save rate — a real, specific, detailed artifact people want to reference later beats generic advice every time

entries.format: auto-scraped — format/style not yet classified, review before use
